SUBJECT: Affiliates: open up (from Jeff Walker)


NAME,

...a complete FRENZY of commission notices just POUNDING into your inbox...

Now THAT'S what I'm talking about!

Hey there... Jeff Walker here. You mighta known I was  lurking behind the scenes of this entire SMARTS launch.

Well, now it's LAUNCH DAY... we're just
minutes from the cart opening.

And guess what?

We have NO FREAKIN' IDEA what's going to happen.

I mean, no one ever really knows before a launch. Trust me on that... I've been through a lot of 'em. Probably more than anyone.

BUT... but this one has all the signs of COMPLETELY rocking. I've been reading the tea leaves, watching the traffic, reading emails, checking the blog comments...

And it looks like we REALLY have them
lathered up.

The topic is BLAZING red-hot. Social Media and Web 2.0 are everywhere. I mean, we have charts showing these sites getting FOUR TIMES more traffic than Google.

And here's another thing - we have a
crazy-insane offer. A full out Coaching
Program for $1397 one-pay.

And then we really went medieval and put in a FIVE pay option at $297 a month.

We've got it all - story, offer, price.

Either this thing is going to convert like gangbusters, or the Internet Marketing world just shifted on its axis.

A couple of other things: like I said up above, when you're 90 minutes out from a launch, you just NEVER EVER know if it's gonna come off.

HOWEVER (and I hate to say this)... I've never fallen on my face yet. I've never been personally involved in a launch that didn't completely kick ass.

I know I'm gonna pay for saying that...
sooner or later my number will come up.

But I don't think it will be this time. This one just has a FEEL about it... maybe it's because of what's happened on the blog in the last 12 hours:

http://stomperblog.com/2008/01/10/smarts-details-course-outline/#comments


And maybe it's because of the sales letter.
We started off with a high-dollar copywriter.
Then Andy called in a few favors from Frank Kern last night... Frank waved his magic wand and Kernified the letter. The I got a hold of it and spent most of last night Walkerfying it...

And let's just say it's not just another boring sales letter.

It's all adding up to a CRUSHING launch.
Which means we're going to pay out some crazy commissions.

So mail early, and mail often.

I've been on the inside of enough launches to know that the partners that mail right at the launch minute and then follow up through the week make a LOT more than everyone else.

So go get 'em...

I have some fresh swipe copy down below...
you know what to do.


best regards,
Jeff

P.S. ohhh... I forgot to mention JV prizes.
They are really really cool. I got Andy to cough up some serious dough for the prizes.
If I wasn't up nearly all night for the last two nights, then I woulda had time to list them out for you.

Sorry about that... I'll send the list later today or tomorrow. You're gonna like the prize list... it's cool.

NAME,

Over the past few weeks, we've been talking a lot about Social Media. In fact, right now I'd say it's the hottest topic in the Internet Marketing world.

And for good reason. The power of the social media can literally make or break your business.

It's true. Just get a few people talking about how wonderful (or God forbid, how
horrible) your product is, and you'll see monumental changes in sales...practically overnight!

It's happened time and time again with many different companies and products, both on the good and the bad side. And guess what? It's not going away.

So how can you take advantage of the social media powerhouse and make it work FOR your business...and not against it?

Easy. Just do what these guys do.

http:// aff link


The SMARTS coaching program is the fastest, easiest way to cash in on the crazy social media traffic and create an entirely new level of success for your business...and your life.

Those brilliant eggheads at Stompernet will take you by the hand and guide you through the steps needed to get people--lots and lots of people--saying good things about you and your products.

Then they'll walk you through the process of transforming yourself from just another face on the net to the go-to authority in your chosen niche.

Prospects will seek you out (instead of the other way around) and flock to buy your products...along with anything else you put your stamp of approval on.

Talk about a license to print money...

http:// aff link


So you wanna see an example of social media in action? Okay...

Remember all those killer "Going Natural 2.0 videos I've been sending you links to over the past few weeks?

And the free Scrutinizer software (valued at $1000)?

And that 50-page Strategy Guide from earlier this week?

Those giveaways contained solid, actionable content that you could use right away. And that's great.

But that wasn't where the REAL magic was happening...

All of these fr*e marketing tools got
thousands of people saying good things about Brad and Andy and all the guys at Stompernet.
And where did they say it?

Blogs and forums.

And where do blog and forum posts always show up very quickly (and very prominently)?

Search Engines.

You doing the math now?

http:// aff link


If you want to learn the secrets to doing exactly what they've done, their SMARTS coaching program goes live at 2:00 pm Eastern today.

And from the looks of it, it's going to be a sizzling hot ticket... I'm betting it will sell out in just minutes.

So if you really want to make some money--and I mean SERIOUS money--in 2008, then you've gotta get in on this deal. Because it definitely won't last for long.

http:// aff link


AFFILIATE 
P.S. I think you'll agree that the whole "we crashed the server with so many orders" ploy has been waaaay overdone.

But in this case, that's exactly what's going to happen. I can almost guarantee it.

Why? It's simple. Because of their highly effective social marketing tactics (the same ones you'll learn in the SMARTS program), tens of thousands of people will be lined up and waiting to bombard the server at exactly at 2:00 pm Eastern today.
